hooks.command: node -e "const cmd = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT; if (!cmd) process.exit(0); const parsed = JSON.parse(cmd); const c = parsed.command || ''; if (/git\s+(push|commit)/.test(c)) { const branch = require('child_process').execSync('git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null').toString().trim(); if (branch === 'main' || branch === 'master') { console.log('BLOQUEADO: Nao e permitido commit/push direto na main. Crie uma branch primeiro.'); process.exit(1); } } if (/git\s+push.*--force/.test(c)) { console.log('BLOQUEADO: Force push nao e permitido.'); process.exit(1); } if (/git\s+reset\s+--hard/.test(c)) { console.log('BLOQUEADO: git reset --hard nao e permitido. Use git stash ou git checkout.'); process.exit(1); } if (/<<'?EOF'?|<<\s*EOF|cat\s*<</.test(c)) { console.log('BLOQUEADO: Heredoc nao e permitido em Bash tool calls. Use string entre aspas.'); process.exit(1); }"

node -e "const input = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT; if (!input) process.exit(0); const parsed = JSON.parse(input); const fp = parsed.file_path || ''; const branch = require('child_process').execSync('git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null').toString().trim(); if (branch.startsWith('ui/')) { const allowed = ['/src/client/views/', '/src/client/styles/', '/src/views/', '/static/', '/prototypes/']; if (!allowed.some(a => fp.includes(a))) { console.log('BLOQUEADO: Branch ui/* so pode modificar views, styles, static e prototypes. Arquivo: ' + fp); process.exit(1); } } if (branch.startsWith('proto/')) { if (!fp.includes('/prototypes/')) { console.log('BLOQUEADO: Branch proto/* so pode modificar arquivos em prototypes/. Arquivo: ' + fp); process.exit(1); } }"

node -e "const cmd = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT; if (!cmd) process.exit(0); const parsed = JSON.parse(cmd); const c = parsed.command || ''; if (/git\s+commit/.test(c)) { try { const stat = require('child_process').execSync('git diff HEAD~1 --stat --format= 2>/dev/null').toString(); const files = stat.trim().split('\n').filter(l => l.trim()).length; if (files > 10) { console.log('ALERTA: Commit com ' + files + ' arquivos (max recomendado: 10). Considere quebrar em commits menores. Ver WORKFLOW.md'); } } catch(e) {} }"
